name: hermes
description: OpenAI-compatible AI agent gateway (NousResearch Hermes, overlay-only)

env.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
env.prompt: OpenRouter API key (optional — at least one provider required for Hermes to serve a model)

env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.prompt: OpenAI API key or OAuth access token (optional — alternative to OpenRouter)
